statement: Save status UI — Show save status clearly in the Builder, preferably through User Island / — Affects User Island, Builder Header, save state returned
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: Reduces anxiety and prevents accidental closing while unsynced.
